seo.title: Data Scientist Salary in India 2026 | Freshers to Seniors
seo.description: Discover the exact Data Scientist salary in India for 2026. Breakdowns by experience, city (Bangalore, Pune, Hyderabad), and top paying companies like Google and Amazon.
seo.keywords: data scientist salary india, machine learning salary, AI salary bangalore, fresher data scientist salary
seo.ogDescription: See how much Data Scientists actually earn in India, from freshers to 10+ years experience.

hero.title: Data Scientist Salary in India
hero.description: Data Science remains one of the highest-paying domains in India. Here is the comprehensive 2026 salary guide across experience levels, cities, and top employers.

experience.notes: Highly dependent on college tier (IIT/NIT vs Tier 3) and internship experience.
Requires strong command over SQL, Python, and basic ML deployment.
Expected to lead data strategies and mentor junior data scientists.
Often includes heavy ESOPs (stock options) in product-based companies.

futureOutlook: With the rise of Generative AI, the demand for traditional Data Scientists who can also engineer LLM pipelines is skyrocketing. Salaries for hybrid AI/Data Science roles in India are expected to grow by another 25% by 2028.
